title: Management Consultant Analyst
description:
Target operates 1,900+ stores across the U.S. and serves guests through Target.com. We're committed to inclusive retail innovation.

We're seeking a Management Consultant Analyst to join our Retail team in Omaha. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Support management consulting projects with research and analysis
Develop financial models and business case analyses
Conduct market research and competitive analysis
Create presentation materials and executive summaries
Support client meetings and deliverable development
Contribute to process improvement and operational efficiency projects

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Finance, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years in consulting, strategy, or business analysis
